title_en: The Governance Phase Begins — IOG Loads ₳115M+ of Treasury Asks in a Single Week, Midnight City Comes Alive
title_ja: 治世のフェーズへ — IOG が ₳115M+ の予算回路を全開し、Midnight City が「街」を動かした
executive_summary_en:
W21 will be recorded as the week when **macro loosened, equities recovered, but crypto did not respond** — and **in the gap, Cardano quietly entered its governance phase**.

The liquidity tightening that ran through W20 as a four-point synchronization (stronger dollar + higher US 10-year yields + weaker yen + higher oil) shifted in W21 into **three-point simultaneous easing**: **VIX -9.39% / US 10-year -3.7 bp / WTI -4.11% / Brent -4.85%**, with the dollar (DXY) essentially flat at +0.05%. **SPX +0.88% / DJI +2.13% / Nikkei +2.36%** marked a clean risk-on return in traditional equities. And yet, the chain reaction lower in crypto — **BTC -4.19% / ETH -6.72% / ADA -6.17% / XRP -6.29% / SOL -4.78%** — continued **disconnected from both the macro easing and the equity rebound**. **Macro eased, equities recovered, and crypto alone did not respond** — that is the subject of W21.

But W21 is not simply a continuation of W20. **Three structurally new movements landed on the Cardano ecosystem** this week.

**First movement — IOG concentrated ₳115M+ of treasury asks at the DReps**. Input Output (formerly IOHK) published six treasury proposals across the six-day window from W20's tail to W21 (2026-05-15 through 2026-05-20): **Cardano Maintenance ₳62.13M** (published 5/19 · Action ID `73e171a4...dbdc1d6762#3` · 9-month operational budget) / **Cardano Upgrades / Three Capabilities ₳13.10M** (published 5/15 · DReps voting deadline **5/24** = the publication date of this Brief) / **Cardano High Assurance ₳13.08M** (published 5/15 · Blaster formal verification + CBDE) / **Plutus Enhancement ₳11.87M** (published 5/18) / **Developer Experience Initiative ₳3.6M** (published 5/18) / **Pogun Bitcoin DeFi ₳12.29M** (published 5/20). **Total ₳115.97M (IOG alone)**. With **CCI V2 ₳23M** (Cardano Critical Integrations V2 · on-chain submission 5/21) and the **Eternl Treasury proposal** in parallel, **₳139M+ of active treasury budget was on the DReps' decision table by the end of W21**. Cardano governance has moved from the phase where 'the framework is in place' to the phase where **capital allocation is actually being decided**.

**Second movement — Midnight descended from 'language' into 'the city'**. On 5/22, Charles Hoskinson announced the **Midnight City V2 launch** (2D AI Simulation · agent spawning coming next). The Midnight Community Japan echo on the same day brought W20's declarative shift ('The answer is Midnight') into the **operational phase**. The same week, the Aliit Fellowship developer cohort (Consensus Miami) and the Midnight × Smart Compliance feature ran in parallel, while the **EMURGO × SecondFi × Slash Cardano Card Japan launch** advanced crypto-payments grounding in Japan. NIGHT was **+1.21% W-o-W**, the **sole positive print in the BTC/ETH/ADA/XRP/SOL comparison set** (ATOM +7.77% and ALGO +0.91% sit on different axes) — possibly the **first reversal signal** of the 'price-lagging, usage-leading' hypothesis articulated in W20.

**Third movement — macro loosened, but the market did not respond**. The US 10-year yield retraced from 4.595% to 4.558% (**-3.7 bp**), VIX dropped from 18.43 to 16.70 (**-9.39%**), oil reversed -4% to -5%, and the Iran tension premium partially unwound. Treasury Secretary Bessent's 'excessive FX volatility is undesirable' remark (5/19) and a slight decline in Polymarket's 'zero rate cuts in 2026' probability provided the backdrop. But gold was -0.73% (essentially flat) and bond market structural stress logged intraweek spikes that were reported (with secondary-source caveats). **The macro easing remained at the surface; structural stress continued** — this is the working hypothesis that explains why crypto did not respond.

**Governance activation alongside price silence** — the core of reading W21 condenses into a single observation: **at the moment Cardano entered its governance phase (the active decision phase for capital allocation), the market froze its response**. The investment implication is a two-stage posture: **short-term (1-4 weeks) attention to crypto-sector rotation (independent axes like NIGHT and ATOM) + medium-term (2026 H2-2027) tracing of where the ₳139M+ of treasury outflows actually lands in the implementation pipeline**.
executive_summary_ja:
W21 は、**マクロは緩んだ、エクイティは戻った、しかし crypto は応えなかった** — そして **その間に Cardano は治世のフェーズに静かに入った** 一週として記録される。

W20 で「ドル高 + 利回り高 + 円安 + 原油高」の四点同期で進行した流動性引き締めは、W21 で **三点が同時緩和** に転じた — **VIX -9.39% / 米 10 年 -3.7bp / WTI -4.11% / Brent -4.85%**、DXY はほぼ横ばい（+0.05%）。**SPX +0.88% / DJI +2.13% / Nikkei +2.36%** の伝統的エクイティは大幅 risk-on に戻った。それにもかかわらず、**BTC -4.19% / ETH -6.72% / ADA -6.17% / XRP -6.29% / SOL -4.78%** という暗号資産の連鎖下落は **マクロ regime からも、エクイティの戻りからも切り離されて** 進んだ。**マクロ緩和とエクイティ戻りに crypto だけが応えなかった** — これが W21 の主旋律である。

しかし W21 を W20 の単純な続編にしているのではない。**Cardano エコシステム側に、構造的に新しい動きが 3 つ降りた** —

**第一の動き — IOG が DReps に ₳115M+ の予算要求を集中投入した**。Input Output（旧 IOHK）が W20 末から W21 にかけて（5/15-5/20 の 6 日間）で 6 件の Treasury 提案を公表した：**Cardano Maintenance ₳62.13M**（5/19 公開 · Action ID `73e171a4...dbdc1d6762#3` · 9 ヶ月運用予算）/ **Cardano Upgrades / Three Capabilities ₳13.10M**（5/15 公開 · DReps 投票期限 **5/24**＝本稿公開日）/ **Cardano High Assurance ₳13.08M**（5/15 公開 · Blaster 形式検証 + CBDE）/ **Plutus Enhancement ₳11.87M**（5/18 公開）/ **Developer Experience Initiative ₳3.6M**（5/18 公開）/ **Pogun Bitcoin DeFi ₳12.29M**（5/20 公開）。**合計 ₳115.97M（IOG 単独）**。これに **CCI V2 ₳23M**（Cardano Critical Integrations V2 · 5/21 オンチェーン提出）と **Eternl Treasury 提案** が並走し、**W21 終了時点で ₳139M+ の予算サイクルが DReps の判断テーブルに同時に載った**。Cardano governance は「枠組みが整った」フェーズから「**実際に capital allocation を判断するフェーズ**」へ移行したと言える。

**第二の動き — Midnight が「言葉」から「街」に降りた**。5/22 に Charles Hoskinson が **Midnight City V2 launch** を公表（**2D AI Simulation**・agent spawning は次段階）、Midnight Community Japan の同日告知と合わせて、W20 の宣言「The answer is Midnight」を**運用フェーズに着地** させた。同週、Aliit Fellowship 開発者コホート（Consensus Miami）と **Midnight × Smart Compliance** 記事が並走、EMURGO × SecondFi × Slash の **Cardano Card 日本ローンチ** が暗号資産決済の Japan 接地を進めた。NIGHT は **+1.21% W-o-W** で **BTC/ETH/ADA/XRP/SOL の比較セットでは唯一プラス**（ATOM +7.77% / ALGO +0.91% も別軸でプラスを記録）— W20 で観察した「価格遅行・利用先行」仮説の **最初の反転シグナル** が NIGHT に出始めた可能性がある。

**第三の動き — マクロは緩んだが、市場は応えなかった**。米国 10 年利回りは 4.595% → 4.558% に **-3.7bp 低下**、VIX は 18.43 → 16.7 に **-9.39%** 低下、原油（WTI/Brent）は **-4-5%** 反落、Iran 緊張プレミアム部分解消。Bessent 財務長官の「過度な為替変動は望ましくない」発言（5/19）と Polymarket「2026 利下げゼロ」確率の微低下が背景にある。しかし金（Gold）は -0.73% で大きく動かず、bond market の構造的ストレスは intraweek でスパイクを記録する場面も観測された（報道ベース）。**マクロ緩和は表層に止まり、構造ストレスは継続している** — これが crypto の応えなさを説明する仮説である。

**ガバナンス活性化と価格の沈黙の同居** — W21 を読み解く核は、**「Cardano が治世（capital allocation の意思決定）に入った瞬間、市場は反応を凍結した」** という観察に集約される。投資判断としての示唆は、**短期 (1-4 週) は crypto セクター内のローテーション（NIGHT / ATOM 等の独立軸）に注目、中期 (2026 H2-2027) は ₳139M+ の Treasury 流出先（実装パイプラインの厚み）を読むトレーシング** の二段構えが妥当である。

four_panel_summary.governance: W21 marked Cardano governance entering active capital-allocation phase: IOG published 6 large treasury proposals across W20-tail through W21 (Maintenance ₳62.13M / Three Capabilities ₳13.10M / High Assurance ₳13.08M / Pogun ₳12.29M / Plutus ₳11.87M / DX ₳3.6M = ₳115.97M total) + CCI V2 ₳23M on-chain (5/21) + Eternl Treasury proposal — ₳139M+ on DReps decision table by W21 close. Three Capabilities ₳13.10M voting deadline 5/24 (publication date). Charles research-proposal friction reported (secondary-source caveat). SIPO DRep #11 / 1,010 maintained.
four_panel_summary.governance_ja: W21 で Cardano ガバナンスは active capital-allocation フェーズへ移行：IOG が W20 末から W21 にかけて 6 大 Treasury 提案を公表（Maintenance ₳62.13M / Three Capabilities ₳13.10M / High Assurance ₳13.08M / Pogun ₳12.29M / Plutus ₳11.87M / DX ₳3.6M = 合計 ₳115.97M）+ CCI V2 ₳23M オンチェーン提出（5/21）+ Eternl Treasury 提案 — W21 終了時点で ₳139M+ が DReps の判断テーブルに同時に載った。Three Capabilities ₳13.10M の DReps 投票期限は 5/24（本稿公開日）。Charles 研究予算摩擦が報道ベースで観測。SIPO は DRep #11 / 1,010 維持。
four_panel_summary.defi: Leios testnet June launch officially announced by IOG (5/21) — 'Cardano's next scaling era starts in June'. Van Rossem HF mainnet submission target 5/29 (Epoch 634 start 5/30) reconfirmed. ATLAS Cardano DeFi 2.0 public testnet launched (5/22). BTC Karma — first Bitcoin DeFi on Cardano — mainnet prep announced via IOG official (5/19). cardano-node v11.0.1 / Plutus UPLC 10%+ cost reduction / Hydra-node 2.1.0 entered SPO penetration phase. Cardano TVL ~$140-150M (slight retracement).
four_panel_summary.defi_ja: Leios testnet 6 月起動が IOG 公式アナウンス（5/21）—「Cardano's next scaling era starts in June」。Van Rossem HF mainnet 提出ターゲット 5/29（Epoch 634 開始 5/30）再確認。ATLAS Cardano DeFi 2.0 public testnet 起動（5/22）。BTC Karma — Cardano の初の Bitcoin DeFi プロトコル — mainnet 準備が IOG 公式経由で告知（5/19）。cardano-node v11.0.1 / Plutus UPLC 10%+ 自動最適化 / Hydra-node 2.1.0 が SPO 浸透フェーズへ。Cardano TVL 約 $140-150M（微減）。
four_panel_summary.midnight: Midnight City V2 launched (5/22) — 2D AI Simulation, agent spawning V3 anticipated. NIGHT W-o-W +1.21% (sole positive in BTC/ETH/ADA/XRP/SOL set) with single-day +5.7% jump on 5/23 — possibly first inversion of 'price-lagging, usage-leading' hypothesis. Aliit Fellowship developer cohort at Consensus Miami. EMURGO × SecondFi × Slash Cardano Card Japan launch announced (5/19), aligning with FSA Funds Settlement Act cabinet order (5/22 publication / 6/1 enforcement) creating 'Electronic Payment Instrument / Crypto Asset Service Intermediary Business' category.
four_panel_summary.midnight_ja: Midnight City V2 が launch（5/22）— 2D AI Simulation、agent spawning V3 anticipated。NIGHT W-o-W +1.21%（BTC/ETH/ADA/XRP/SOL の比較セットでは唯一プラス）で、5/23 単日 +5.7% 急騰 —「価格遅行・利用先行」仮説の初の反転シグナルの可能性。Aliit Fellowship 開発者コホート Consensus Miami。EMURGO × SecondFi × Slash Cardano Card 日本ローンチ告知（5/19）、FSA 資金決済法改正政令（5/22 公布 / 6/1 施行）の新業種「電子決済手段・暗号資産サービス仲介業」創設と整合。
four_panel_summary.risk: Overall MEDIUM → (flat). Macro MEDIUM ↘ (one-step improvement from W20 HIGH) — VIX -9.39%, TNX -3.7bp, WTI -4.11%, Iran tension partial unwind. Regulatory LOW → — CLARITY floor schedule awaited, Fed Payment Account RFC 5/20 (primary confirmed), FSA Funds Settlement Act 5/22 cabinet order (primary confirmed). Architecture LOW → — Leios testnet, IOG 6 proposals, cardano-node v11.0.1 penetration. Adoption LOW ↘ (improvement) — Midnight City V2, Cardano Card Japan, NIGHT +1.21%. Governance MEDIUM ↗ (newly visible high-load) — ₳139M+ simultaneous parallel decisions.
four_panel_summary.risk_ja: 総合 MEDIUM →（横ばい）。Macro MEDIUM ↘（W20 HIGH から一段改善）— VIX -9.39%、TNX -3.7bp、WTI -4.11%、Iran 緊張部分解消。Regulatory LOW → — CLARITY 本会議スケジュール待機、Fed Payment Account RFC 5/20（一次確認）、FSA 資金決済法改正政令 5/22 公布（一次確認）。Architecture LOW → — Leios testnet、IOG 6 大提案、cardano-node v11.0.1 浸透。Adoption LOW ↘（一段改善）— Midnight City V2、Cardano Card 日本ローンチ、NIGHT +1.21%。Governance MEDIUM ↗（新規顕在化・高負荷）— ₳139M+ 同時並走の判断負荷。
